questions.question: 4 (a) A 12 V, 50 W immersion heater is used to heat 0.15 kg of water in a beaker. The water is initially at a room temperature of 20 °C. The specific heat capacity of water is 4200 J / (kg °C). Calculate the energy supplied to raise the temperature of the water from 20 °C to 58 °C. energy = ......................................................... [3] (b) The immersion heater
